query:
SELECT businessDate,
  COUNT(*) AS reportCount,
  SUM(cups4ozHere) AS cups4ozHere,
  SUM(cups4ozToGo) AS cups4ozToGo,
  SUM(cups8ozHere) AS cups8ozHere,
  SUM(cups8ozToGo) AS cups8ozToGo,
  SUM(cupsPintHere) AS cupsPintHere,
  SUM(cupsPintToGo) AS cupsPintToGo,
  SUM(cupsLiterHere) AS cupsLiterHere,
  SUM(cupsLiterToGo) AS cupsLiterToGo,
  SUM(cups4oz) AS cups4oz,
  SUM(cups8oz) AS cups8oz,
  SUM(cupsPint) AS cupsPint,
  SUM(cupsLiter) AS cupsLiter,
  ROUND(SUM(cashTotal + cardTotal + zelleTotal + venmoTotal), 2) AS employeeReportedPayments
FROM endOfDayReports
WHERE businessDate = '2026-05-15'
GROUP BY businessDate;

SELECT readyMadeGelatoShiftType,
  ROUND(SUM(
    GREATEST(
      0,
      LEAST(
        COALESCE(smallPanCount, 0) * ((3.5 - 0.286) * 35.27396195),
        (COALESCE(smallGrossWeightKg, 0) - COALESCE(smallPanCount, 0) * 0.286) * 35.27396195
      )
    ) * (112 / ((3.5 - 0.286) * 35.27396195))
    +
    GREATEST(
      0,
      LEAST(
        COALESCE(largePanCount, 0) * ((4.5 - 0.4) * 35.27396195),
        (COALESCE(largeGrossWeightKg, 0) - COALESCE(largePanCount, 0) * 0.4) * 35.27396195
      )
    ) * (160 / ((4.5 - 0.4) * 35.27396195))
  ), 1) AS totalVolumeOunces
FROM readyMadeGelatoWeights
WHERE businessDate = '2026-05-15'
GROUP BY readyMadeGelatoShiftType;

  ROUND(SUM(cashTotal + cardTotal + zelleTotal + venmoTotal), 2) AS employeeReportedPayments
FROM endOfDayReports

SELECT readyMadeGelatoShiftType,
  ROUND(SUM(
    GREATEST(
      0,
      LEAST(
        COALESCE(smallPanCount, 0) * ((3.5 - 0.286) * 35.27396195),
        (COALESCE(smallGrossWeightKg, 0) - COALESCE(smallPanCount, 0) * 0.286) * 35.27396195
      )
    ) * (112 / ((3.5 - 0.286) * 35.27396195))
    +
    GREATEST(
      0,
      LEAST(
        COALESCE(largePanCount, 0) * ((4.5 - 0.4) * 35.27396195),
        (COALESCE(largeGrossWeightKg, 0) - COALESCE(largePanCount, 0) * 0.4) * 35.27396195
      )
    ) * (160 / ((4.5 - 0.4) * 35.27396195))
  ), 1) AS totalVolumeOunces
FROM readyMadeGelatoWeights
WHERE businessDate = '2026-05-15'
GROUP BY readyMadeGelatoShiftType;
